PDF block quote shows the correct text: 'on a belief Roxane would eventually receive a marital share of\n      Richard’s military retirement. This is a significant transcription error that garbles the meaning of the district court's quoted findings.

The phrase should read 'Richard immediately received $50,500.00' (Richard received the money immediately) not 'of immediately received Richard's military retirement' (nonsensical). Uses curly right quotation mark (U+2019) consistent with DB text.
